Step 1: Set up the C project.
codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project

codeBlocks.section: Step 3: Set up a CMake application
codeBlocks.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (query.out facet_query.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(query.out mongoc::mongoc)

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.11)
project(atlas-search-index LANGUAGES C)
add_executable (query.out facet_query.c)
find_package(mongoc <version> REQUIRED)
target_link_libraries(query.out mongoc::mongoc)

codeBlocks.section: Step 1: Set up and initialize the .NET/C# project.
codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory and initialize the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project
dotnet new console

# Add the MongoDB .NET/C# Driver to your project
dotnet add package MongoDB.Driver

codeBlocks.section: Step 1: Set up the C++ project.
codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project

codeBlocks.section: Step 1: Set up and initialize the Go module.
codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory and initialize the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project
go mod init atlas-search-project

# Add the MongoDB Go Driver to your project
go get go.mongodb.org/mongo-driver/v2/mongo

codeBlocks.section: Step 1: Set up the Python project.
codeBlocks.content:
# Create a new directory for the project
mkdir atlas-search-project && cd atlas-search-project

# Install PyMongo
pip install pymongo

# Create a new Rust project
cargo new atlas-search-facet-tutorial && cd atlas-search-facet-tutorial
